text: The staff were very friendly and helpful. It’s a safe and well-maintained place—we parked our vehicle there twice when traveling to Malaysia and China. A special thank you to Mr. Gayan for his outstanding service. He’s a great person and provided us with airport shuttle service as well. Everything was smooth and professional. Highly recommended!
name: Neranjan Prasad

text: I parked my vehicle at Airport Parking Sri Lanka while travelling abroad, and their service was excellent. They took great care of my vehicle and provided a fast and smooth shuttle service both during departure and arrival—no long waiting times at all. When I returned, they even handed over my vehicle with a free car wash, which was a pleasant surprise.Overall, very reliable and customer-friendly service. Highly recommended for anyone looking for safe and convenient airport parking!
name: Janaka Jayawardana

text: I am very satisfied with the service. This is my second time using it, and both Primali and Gayan provided exceptional support throughout. The facilities for airport pick-up, drop-off, and vehicle parking are excellent—safe, reliable, and convenient. Overall, their high standard of customer service truly stands out. Malith and Family - Kandy
name: Nishadi D

text: An Absolutely Flawless Airport Parking Experience! Our recent four-day trip was made completely stress-free thanks to the phenomenal service we received here. From start to finish, the entire process was incredibly smooth and efficient. The drop-off at the airport was perfectly on time, and just as promised, they were there to pick us up promptly upon our return. What truly set this service apart was the impeccable communication and the extra care they took. A special thank you to Gayan, who was not only professional and courteous but also went above and beyond. To our absolute delight, he had given our car a complimentary wash before handing it back to us. Returning from a holiday to a sparkling clean car was such a wonderful and unexpected gesture. We can recommend this service highly enough for anyone seeking reliable, convenient, and truly exceptional airport parking in Sri Lanka. They have certainly earned a loyal customer in us!
name: Frank Black

text: I had an excellent experience with this car park and shuttle service. Despite contacting them at the last minute, the team understood the urgency and ensured everything was prepared promptly, allowing me to reach my flight on time. Upon my return, the shuttle was ready as soon as I landed, making the journey back to my car seamless and efficient. The service was well-coordinated, and both the driver and the staff member managing logistics were professional and courteous throughout. Overall, a very reliable and pleasant service that I would highly recommend
name: Yugashanth Sathiyaseelan

text: It’s super service I got from the air port parking team. They from us on time & pick up on time & also care my car for 20 days. Thanks team. Also recommend any one who is willing to use the service.
name: udaya naurunna
